CVE-2021-40926.title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in demos/demo.mysqli.php ...
CVE-2021-40926.description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in demos/demo.mysqli.php in getID3 1.X and v2.0.0-beta allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the showtagfiles parameter.
